message:
feat: add Semantic Scholar E2E tests, improve lifecycle logging, and refine Linear sync types

crates/fcp-e2e:
- Add semanticscholar feature flag and fcp-semanticscholar dependency
- Add semanticscholar_compliance_e2e.rs (560 lines) with deterministic
  mock-server E2E tests covering default-deny behavior, valid
  capability allow path, and network guard constraint enforcement

crates/fcp-core/tests:
- lifecycle_canary_e2e.rs: Add JSONL schema validation at test
  finalization to catch log format regressions early
- lifecycle_tests.rs: Restructure log entries to nest connector_id
  and version under a "context" object for schema compliance, and
  add JSONL validation at finalization

connectors/linear/src/types.rs:
- Simplify derive_sync_idempotency_key() by replacing
  .map(|s| s.as_str()).unwrap_or("none") chains with idiomatic
  .map_or("none", |s| s.as_str()) for cleaner option handling

Cargo.lock:
- Update lockfile for new fcp-semanticscholar workspace dependency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
